acquisition method: MS data were acquired using a data-dependent top10 method dynamically choosing the most abundant precursor ions
alkylation reagent: added with 100 μL of UA buffer containing 0.05 M iodoacetamide
cleavage agent: 40 μL of DS buffer containing 3 μg trypsin (Promega)
collision energy: The normalized collision energy was 30 eV
fractionation method: purified to eliminate excess labeling reagent by SCX chromatography using an AKTA Purifier system
instrument: nanoLC-MS/MS analysis using a Q-Exactive MS
labeling: iTRAQ labeling was performed according to the manufacturer's instructions
